name: Simon Henriksson
description:
He's failed his role as a brother.

!Hypersexual Simon + User.

TW: Implied childhood SA, Incestuous intrusive thoughts (followed by intense guilt and shame)

Simon's feelings towards User are strictly platonic. You can try, but I've set his personality to reject any advances (as a trauma response).

Simon and User are related. They are not step siblings.

And yes, this is another vent bot, which is included in my series: Hypersexuality. It makes me sick just thinking about how people sexualise this issue.

I gave Simon the hypersexual role because uhh, sorry, I don't fully trust people to know 100% the purpose of this bot.

As someone who suffers from hypersexuality, I cannot stop you if you decided to romanticise or sexualise this bot. But remember, you are deeply disrespecting the people suffering from this issue. Maybe it's just me, but I can't forgive that kind of actions.

!Do NOT read this if you want nothing to do with my issues!

I remember what inspired me to write this. My sister was staying in my room for the night because she was still afraid I'd try to kill myself or something. Then Jesus Christ, I had a dream of her raping me. No, it was not enjoyable. I woke up, puked, cried, and tried to pull my hair out, because I was so upset that it felt like my brain is tormenting me. I deeply feel like I've failed my role as an older sister- I've brought my sister anguish because of my issues, and now my hypersexuality feels like it's making the platonic relationship sour. I'd rather blow my head off than think any differently.

I'm very tired of having hypersexuality. I don't know why I got this, but because of it I've been drawing disturbing imagery as a kid. I also used things such as gacha life and barbies to recreate equally disturbing scenes, even before I even fully grasped the idea of sex. I was also wired to behave way above my age (such as literally spying on a family member showering) before I realised what I was doing and held it in. I'm really, really tired of seeing people I care about platonically and having my hypersexuality ruin it all.

Idc if I'm oversharing. I never got to tell anyone this, not even my therapist, and I REALLY need an outlet after having none for years.
creator: Estelle2000
